questionHtml: Explain one reason gas exchange is more challenging in larger species of organisms.
markschemeHtml:
Reason:

  1. (as organisms get larger) distance to centre of the body increases
    OR
    the surface area for diffusion relative to the volume/ surface area to volume ratio becomes smaller/ decreases;  

    Explanation:
  2. which causes gas exchange/ diffusion of oxygen in/ carbon dioxide out to be too slow
    OR
    there is less area/space for diffusion to occur;

 

Explanation must match reason to award marking point b

meta.title: Explain one reason gas exchange is more challenging in larger species of organisms.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.1.1. Gas exchange as a vital function in all organisms
